scope.description: docs/content renamed section (3 SamourAI scripts) + docs/insights renamed from old content; full reading flow test

hinge_flow.description: Read a long-form SamourAI formation script end-to-end with TOC navigation
hinge_flow.evidence: Playwright 6/6 script×locale pages show 100% h2->id parity; TOC click produces 5.4k-8.6k px scroll delta

findings.title: Hinge flow TOC bug: h2/h3 heading ids missing
findings.root_cause: compileMDX had no rehype heading-id plugin; extractToc generated hrefs for ids never materialized on DOM
findings.fix: Inline rehype plugin using unist-util-visit + hast-util-to-string walks h2/h3 and assigns id via shared slugify helper now used by extractToc
findings.verification: Production HTML grep: 16/16 h2 ids; Playwright 6/6 pass across locales

findings.title: 404 dead-end: zero clickable links on notFound()
findings.root_cause: No not-found.tsx anywhere in docs tree; framework default 404 has 0 links
findings.fix: Localized (FR/EN) docs-scoped not-found page; inherits docs layout with sidebar + search + mobile nav

findings.title: Folder/key inversion in SECTIONS registry
findings.description: 11-content registered as key 'insights'; 12-content-scripts registered as key 'content'. Works correctly at runtime, confusing on disk.

findings.title: No skip-to-content anchor on article body
